hero.desc: Over 15 years of experience building high-availability systems used by thousands of people every day and without even knowing it, chances are you've already used one of them ;)

plexus.desc: I currently serve as Tech Lead within the product area at Plexus, overseeing Quenda — a turn management and appointment booking system deployed across all citizen service offices of the Madrid City Council.

iam.title: IAM (Informática del Ayuntamiento de Madrid)
iam.desc: Team management, analysis, development, and implementation of Quenda for the Línea Madrid citizen service offices, with direct client interaction in both technical and functional meetings.

correos.title: Correos (Spanish Post Office)
correos.desc: Analysis, development, and implementation of Quenda for Correos post offices in Spain.

endesa.title: Endesa / Enel (Energy Utility)
endesa.desc: Development and implementation of Quenda for Endesa offices in Spain.

tvg.title: TVG (Televisión de Galicia)
tvg.desc: Development, implementation, and deployment in production of a project displaying real-time election results for Galicia and the Basque Country in 2012 and subsequent years.

cixtec.title: CIXTEC (Computer Center for Tax, Economic-Financial, and Accounting Management)
cixtec.desc: Development and customization of the GLPI service management tool.

xunta.title: Xunta de Galicia (Consellería de Medio Ambiente, Territorio e Infraestructuras. Dirección Xeral de Mobilidade)
xunta.desc: Maintenance and development of a software tool for the management of bus route concessions.

deputacion.title: Deputación de Lugo
deputacion.desc: Maintenance and development of an e-commerce platform based on Magento.

globant.desc: Participation in the development of the official ticket-selling web platform for Disney theme parks.

education.title: Education & Certifications
education.tfg_desc: Open-source web application designed to manage translation memories with TMX export capabilities. Features an integrated plugin with "gTranslator" to streamline the workflow.
